description: Structured extraction sample for the dense Qwen model.

messages.content: You extract entities and relationships from engineering incident text. Return compact JSON only with keys: entities, relationships, summary.

Incident summary: During the 03:15 UTC deploy, the checkout-api in eu-central-1 started timing out against neo4j-cluster after the schema-migrator job changed the customer edge index. Platform engineer Marta rolled back the migrator. Customer impact lasted 11 minutes and affected cart-to-order conversion. Extract services, people, regions, jobs, incidents, and relationships.
